item.title: The Case of Sasha Krause
item.description: Sasha Krause, 27, a Mennonite Sunday school teacher, disappeared from her community near Farmington, New Mexico on January 18, 2020. Her body was found five weeks later near Flagstaff, Arizona, more than 270 miles away. Mark Gooch, an airman stationed at Luke Air Force Base in Phoenix, was arrested two months after her remains were discovered. Cell phone records and surveillance footage placed him at both locations. In October 2021, a jury convicted Gooch of kidnapping and first-degree murder. He was sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole in January 2022.

media:content.media:title: The Case of Sasha Krause
media:content.media:description: Sasha Krause, 27, a Mennonite Sunday school teacher, disappeared from her community near Farmington, New Mexico on January 18, 2020. Her body was found five weeks later near Flagstaff, Arizona, more than 270 miles away. Mark Gooch, an airman stationed at Luke Air Force Base in Phoenix, was arrested two months after her remains were discovered. Cell phone records and surveillance footage placed him at both locations. In October 2021, a jury convicted Gooch of kidnapping and first-degree murder. He was sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole in January 2022.

item.title: Christy Bautista Case: A Hotel Room Tragedy
item.description: On March 31, 2023, Christy Bautista, 31, of Harrisonburg, Virginia, was fatally attacked inside her room at the Ivy City Hotel in Washington, DC, where she had traveled to attend a concert. George Sydnor, who had an open warrant and a prior violent criminal history at the time, was arrested at the scene. Sydnor pleaded guilty to first-degree murder in October 2025 and was sentenced to 40 years in prison in January 2026. The case drew public scrutiny over how Sydnor had remained free despite prior violent offenses and a pending court appearance.

media:content.media:title: Christy Bautista Case: A Hotel Room Tragedy
media:content.media:description: On March 31, 2023, Christy Bautista, 31, of Harrisonburg, Virginia, was fatally attacked inside her room at the Ivy City Hotel in Washington, DC, where she had traveled to attend a concert. George Sydnor, who had an open warrant and a prior violent criminal history at the time, was arrested at the scene. Sydnor pleaded guilty to first-degree murder in October 2025 and was sentenced to 40 years in prison in January 2026. The case drew public scrutiny over how Sydnor had remained free despite prior violent offenses and a pending court appearance.
